# kDNSServiceFlagsBogus | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

- [ kDNSServiceFlagsBogus ](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsBogus)

-  kDNSServiceFlagsBogus 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsBogus

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceFlagsBogus: UInt32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsBogus#Discussion)

If the response cannot be verified to be secure due to expired signatures, missing signatures, and so on, then the results are considered to be bogus.
